heroSub: Premium website, registration path and customer acceptance system for businesses that do not want to lose conversations in DM, WhatsApp, Telegram and comments.
metric1: One page instead of chaos in the news
experienceSub: The customer does not have to write, wait for a response or ask about the basics. He sees the offer, understands the value, selects the scope and leaves the data.
phoneTitle: The customer moves from interest to application.
feature1Title: The customer lands on the website
feature1Text: From Instagram, TikTok, Google, WhatsApp, Telegram, an ad or a simple link. Each input leads to one polished presentation.
feature2Text: Instead of sending prices and descriptions manually, you show the offer, packages, rules and action buttons in one place.
feature3Text: Not a casual "how much does it cost?", just customer data, the selected scope and context for the conversation.
manifestSub: The website is supposed to explain the offer, shorten conversations, lead the customer to action and collect data in a simple, clean way.
manifestLine1Strong: I don't sell a "nice business card".
manifestLine1Text: I'm building a screen that the customer can get from any channel and immediately understand: what you offer, why it's worth it and what the next step is.
manifestLine2Strong: The most important thing is the flow of decisions.
manifestLine2Text: A good website doesn't just look premium. She reduces the number of questions, organizes the offer and guides the client to submit an application.
mini1Text: The offer looks like a product, not a long message.
mini2Text: The customer knows what to click and what data to leave.
mini3Text: The conversation starts with context, not from scratch.
manifestLine3Strong: Automation is not only about Instagram.
manifestLine3Text: Social media, reklama, Google, WhatsApp, Telegram i linki z bio są tylko wejściami. Główna wartość to własna strona, która przyjmuje klienta.
pricingSub: The price includes: business landing page, text adaptation to the industry, style selection, offer/services, FAQ, contact, application form and basic implementation.
offer1Text: For a business that wants to have its own place to show its offer and accept specific applications.
offer2Text: For a business that wants to direct customers from social media, advertising and messengers to one coherent path.
offer3Text: Texts, sections and page style tailored to the local service. We price extensions and greater automation separately.
pricingNote: Each variant can be adapted to the industry: beauty, barber, studio, consultations, local services or any other business that needs to collect reports without chaos.
productSub: The same proven layout and the same cards remain. We only change the meaning: from these elements to elements of your product.
productCard1Text: The first screen, offer, sections with arguments and CTA set so that the customer understands the value before contact.
productCard2Text: The customer goes through scope selection, data, date and confirmation without manual ping-pong in messages.
productCard3Text: Instagram, TikTok, Google, advertising and instant messaging lead to one page, not chaos in five conversations.
effectTitle1: The offer looks like a product,
effectSub: We leave the proven gallery screen, but instead of cutting photos we show the system logic: lead, flow, CTA, path and data.
proofSub: The website should look like a normal product, not a random link from the news.
review1: This is exactly the page I can recommend to others.
review2: It looks more premium than typical landing pages: everything reads fast and clear.
review3: Strong presentation and clear structure - the client can take the next step more easily.
processOutput: The customer knows what he has chosen. You know what to come back with.
processTitle: The website does the first part of the conversation for you.
processText: The customer sees the offer, understands the difference between the options and leaves the data. You don't explain everything from scratch in every message.
faqSub: Click on the question and the answer will open as a separate screen.
contactLeadText: Leave your contact details and we will discuss the details of the website in conversation.
contactNote: Premium website, application path and system for local businesses.
contactBoxText: Premium website, registration path and reporting system for businesses that do not want to lose customers in the news.
mobileHeroSub: The customer comes from anywhere, sees the offer and follows a straight path to the application.
mobileOfferSub: Swipe the tabs and select your system variant.
mobileOffer1Text: Your own premium website, offer, sales sections and registration/form.
mobileOffer2Text: Instagram, TikTok, Google, WhatsApp, Telegram and ads lead to one page.
mobileOffer3Text: Texts, sections and site style tailored to your local service.
mobileProductSub: A product that leaves an impression is now a system function.
mobileProductCard1Text: Hero, offer, sections with arguments and strong CTA.
mobileProductCard2Text: The customer goes through the selection and data without typing over and over again.
mobileProductCard3Text: Traffic from different places goes to one refined website.
mobileEffectSub: Swipe the cards and see the logic of the system.
gallery1Text: The customer leaves data after seeing the offer, not blindly.
gallery2Text: The website guides you through the choices instead of leaving the customer with questions.
gallery3Text: Each screen has a clear next step.
gallery4Text: All channels lead to one path.
gallery5Text: The owner gets more than a simple "hello".

mobileReview1: "This is exactly the page I can recommend to others."
mobileReview2: "It looks more premium than typical landing pages: everything reads fast and clear."
mobileReview3: "Strong presentation and clear structure - the client can take the next step more easily."
reviewCtaText: The button opens the system selection in exactly the same way as in etalon.
